title: Vegan Stir Fry with Crunchy Toppings
description: A simple and flavorful vegan stir fry recipe topped with crunchy ingredients.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the stir fry and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped potato and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a separate pan, toast the crunchy topping until fragrant.
Serve the stir fry hot, topped with the crunchy topping and chopped Chinese cabbage.
